summary: Completed testing for Iteration 31 - Bulk Variant Creation Feature. Backend tests: 10/10 passed. Frontend: Modal opens correctly, preview scan works but takes time for large catalogs. All APIs working correctly.

issues: Preview scan can take 60+ seconds for large catalogs (200 products) - consider adding progress indicator or reducing default limit

critical_code_review_comments: Backend bulk-variants endpoints are well-structured with proper async handling
Preview API correctly implements dry-run with no changes to Shopify
Creation API uses background tasks for long-running operations
Status API provides detailed logs for job tracking
Frontend modal has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Modal correctly shows loading state and DRY-RUN notice
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 tested Bulk Variant Creation feature. Key endpoints: POST /api/shopify/products/bulk-variants/preview (dry-run scan), POST /api/shopify/products/bulk-variants/create (starts background job), GET /api/shopify/products/bulk-variants/status/{job_id} (job progress). Frontend modal at /products page with 'Preview Missing Variants' button. Previous job db37d097 created 20 variants for product 7506808635415.
